titleStmt.title: SII 36.264: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 264. (A.R. No. 264 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Two residents of Talaicayanappuram alias Taiyyur installed an image of Maṇavāḷapperumāḷ in the temple of Varākasvāmi at Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam and granted 10 kaḻañjus of gold. The sabha and ūr assemblies agreed to supply annually 56 kāḍi of short variety of paddy (kuṭṭai nel) and maintain the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīrapāṇṭiyanait talaikoṇṭa kovirājamārāyarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu Āmūrk koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭut tevatāna tiru
viṭavantai sapaiyomum Ūromum kaiyyeḻuttu talaicayanappuṟamākiya taiyyūr vaiyyo kiparan vaikun=ta makaḷum Ivankupa
Ivviruvarum tiruviṭavantai śrīvarāhaśvāmikaḷukku Aṭṭuvitta tirumeni maṇavāḷap perumāḷukku Ivviruvaruṅ kuṭutta pon patin kaḻañcu ponppatiṉṅ ka
ḻañcum Ipponkoṇṭu Iponṉukkup palicai Aṭṭa Itaṟkku can=tirātittavaṟ nicati Aññāḻippaṭikku Aṭṭi Āṇṭu toṟum Aḷakka
kkaṭava nellu Aimpattaṟu kāṭi kuṭṭainellum paṅkuni cittiraiyumakappaṭa Īramum patarum nīkkit tūyavākki Eṇṇāḻik kālāl Aṭṭuvommā
nom Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Aimpattaṟu kāṭi kuṭṭainelluṅ kaikkoṇṭu Aḷantu kuṭukkak kaṭavomānom Itaṟṟiṟampil tanmāsana mutalāka
tāṉ veṇṭu kovukku nicati Araikkālp pon manṟap peṟuvatākavum Ittaṇṭappaṭṭum Inṉellu vaḻuvāme Aḷantu ku(pa)ṭuppatā
kavum Itaṟk kahitañ coṉṉār keṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvaṅ koḷvār koḷḷavum Ittanmam rakṣi
ppār śrīpātam Entalai melinavarāka Ipparicu Ōṭṭikkuṭuttom muṟcollappaṭṭa tiruviṭavantai sapaiyomum Ūromum Āka Iraṇṭu tiṟattom
Digital edition of SII 36.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
